display.purpose: Hero headings and primary section titles. Maximum visual authority.

headline.purpose: Project names, panel titles, card headings.

label.purpose: Metric labels, chart axis labels, badge text. The only place letter-spacing opens up.

mono.purpose: All financial figures, code snippets, pipeline views. Always with tabular-nums.

shadows.name: glass-ambient-light
shadows.purpose: Diffuse lift under glass panels in light mode.

shadows.name: glass-ambient-dark
shadows.purpose: Stronger ambient separation in dark mode.

shadows.name: button-lift
shadows.purpose: Focused drop shadow on primary CTA buttons in the button's hue.

shadows.name: cta-card-glow
shadows.purpose: Purple halo under AI Value Model entry card on hover.

shadows.name: cta-btn-glow
shadows.purpose: Ambient glow on the AI CTA button at rest.

shadows.name: cta-btn-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Elevated purple glow on AI CTA button hover.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions and entrance animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The only CTA that commands. Blue fill, white text, focused shadow in the button's hue.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0068FF; color: #fff; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 0.5rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,104,255,0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(0,104,255,0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Bordered, transparent. Supporting actions alongside primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #E2E8F0; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, border-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(30,30,46,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Low-hierarchy action. Subtle border, secondary text color at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(30,30,46,0.6); color: #94A3B8; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 10px 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease-out, color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(37,37,56,1); color: #E2E8F0; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.5); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Badge — Action Blue
components.description: Semantic tag for tech/action context. Tinted background, ink text, hairline border.
components.css: .ds-badge-blue { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(0,104,255,0.1); color: #4D94FF; border: 1px solid rgba(0,104,255,0.2); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Badge — Positive Green
components.css: .ds-badge-green { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: rgba(74,246,195,0.1); color: #4AF6C3; border: 1px solid rgba(74,246,195,0.2); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 4px 12px; }

components.name: Glass Panel
components.description: Signature data container. Frosted glass, used exclusively on dashboards and overlays.
components.css: .ds-glass-panel { background: rgba(17,17,24,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; transition: background 300ms, border-color 300ms, box-shadow 300ms; } .ds-glass-label { color: #E2E8F0; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; }

components.name: Metric Card
components.description: KPI display unit built on Glass Panel. Label → mono value → impact change indicator. Tabular-nums always.
components.css: .ds-metric-card { background: rgba(17,17,24,0.6); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-metric-label { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #828FA6; } .ds-metric-value { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: #E2E8F0; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-metric-change { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-size: 0.875rem; } .ds-metric-positive { color: #4AF6C3; } .ds-metric-negative { color: #FF6B66; } .ds-metric-neutral { color: #828FA6; }

narrative.overview:
A visual system built for people who work with numbers for a living. Every element is machined to exact tolerances — not styled. The interface doesn't try to impress; it communicates. A CIO landing on this portfolio should feel the same way they feel when they open a Bloomberg terminal: orientation in seconds, depth on demand, no time wasted.

The system is dual-theme: dark mode is the primary brand surface (deep navy-blacks that frame financial data with authority), with a light mode that is equally rigorous — clean whites, carefully checked contrast, the same structural discipline in a different register.

What this system explicitly rejects: the over-designed agency site where motion and WebGL replace substance; the generic AI portfolio with purple gradients and hero-metric cards; the startup SaaS landing with its warm neutrals and evenly-distributed pastel grid.
keyCharacteristics: Flat structural surfaces with glass reserved for data containers
Semantic color: every accent means something specific and nothing else
Two-voice typography: Space Grotesk commands, Inter serves
Financial-grade numeric rendering with JetBrains Mono + tabular-nums
Reduced-motion compliant; every animation degrades to a static equivalent
WCAG AA minimum across all surfaces and themes

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Each accent color carries exactly one semantic meaning: blue for interaction, green for positive financial outcomes, red for negative, orange for warnings, purple for AI/intelligence. Never decorative.

rules.name: The Ink/Fill Split Rule
rules.body: Bright fills (#0068FF, #4AF6C3, etc.) are for backgrounds and borders. Text uses the ink variant (#0052CC light / #4D94FF dark). The fill colors fail WCAG AA as text on white — the ink variants don't.

rules.name: The Two Voices Rule
rules.body: Space Grotesk is for headings, metric values, and navigation. Inter is for body copy, descriptions, and helper text. Neither appears in the other's role.

rules.name: The Tabular Precision Rule
rules.body: Every financial figure — currency, percentage, ratio — renders in JetBrains Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums. No exceptions.

rules.name: The Glass Earns It Rule
rules.body: Glass panels appear on data containers and overlaying elements (navbar on scroll, modals). The page background and structural layout sections are flat — no glass.

rules.name: The State-Only Shadow Rule
rules.body: Standard flat surfaces have no shadow at rest. Shadows appear on hover and on glass panels. Never as decoration on a resting card.

dos: Do render every financial figure in JetBrains Mono with font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums
Do use accent fill colors only for backgrounds and borders; switch to ink variant for text
Do verify WCAG AA contrast for any text on a tinted or dark background
Do add data-lenis-prevent to every scrollable container
Do use glass panels exclusively on data containers and overlays
Do write negative financial values in red parentheses — accounting notation
Do restrict intelligence purple to AI-adjacent features only
Do cap display heading letter-spacing at -0.02em
Do use text-wrap: balance on h1–h3
Do provide a @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) fallback for every animation
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient)
Don't add motion for atmosphere — motion earns its place by serving meaning
Don't use glass panels on marketing sections or hero backgrounds
Don't use cursor effects, WebGL backgrounds, or scroll-jacking beyond Lenis
Don't use purple for anything other than AI/intelligence features
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards
Don't nest glass panels inside glass panels
Don't use border-radius greater than 1rem on cards or panels
Don't deploy the hero-metric template as a portfolio layout pattern
Don't use identical card grids — vary layout, density, and visual weight
